title: GitHub - AlmanacCode/codealmanac: A codebase wiki for AI coding agents. Captures what the code can't say: decisions, flows, invariants, gotchas.
excerpt: A codebase wiki for AI coding agents. Captures what the code can't say: decisions, flows, invariants, gotchas. - AlmanacCode/codealmanac
content_html:
A living wiki for your codebase, maintained by AI coding agents.

CodeAlmanac gives AI agents the context code alone cannot hold: why a system is shaped the way it is, what broke before, which invariants matter, and how workflows cross files and services. The wiki is plain markdown in your repo, indexed locally, and reviewed in Git like any other code change.

Supported today: macOS with Codex or Claude Code. Requires Python 3.12+.

Quickstart

uv tool install codealmanac@latest
codealmanac setup

See Setup for configuration options.

Once CodeAlmanac is set up:

cd your-repo
codealmanac init                     # Makes your wiki, if you don't have one
codealmanac search "getting started" # Shows matching wiki pages.
codealmanac show getting-started     # Opens one page in the terminal
codealmanac serve                    # Shows the wiki in local web viewer.

Setup

Install global agent instructions for the local tools you use:

# Interactive setup
codealmanac setup

# Quick install with recommended defaults; uses Codex as the AI runner
codealmanac setup --yes

# Quick install using Claude as the AI runner
codealmanac setup --yes --runner claude

Setup installs agent instructions for your chosen tools and three local macOS launchd jobs. The jobs and all wiki work run locally.

Job Default schedule What it does
Sync Every 5 hours Scans recent Codex and Claude conversations and queues useful knowledge for the relevant registered wiki.
Garden Every 24 hours Reviews every registered wiki for stale, duplicated, or poorly connected knowledge.
Update Every 24 hours Checks for and installs CodeAlmanac CLI updates when it is safe to do so.

These schedules run locally in the background. Use codealmanac automation status to see what is installed.

The final setup step asks about anonymous telemetry and recommends Yes so we can see which commands work and where the CLI breaks. It sends controlled command and lifecycle outcomes plus sanitized unhandled crashes under a random install UUID. It never sends code, paths, arguments, queries, prompts, transcripts, repository/run IDs, locals, or credentials; GeoIP is disabled. Choose No in setup, pass setup --no-telemetry, set telemetry.enabled to false, or use DO_NOT_TRACK=1 at any time. Without a future login, the UUID profile has no name or email.

If you don't have Codex or prefer Claude, use --runner claude.

--target only chooses which global agent instruction files to install; it does not choose the AI runner:

codealmanac setup --yes --target codex
codealmanac setup --yes --target claude

Customize automatic work during setup:

# Change how often recent agent conversations are scanned
codealmanac setup --yes --sync-every 5h

# Do not install automatic transcript sync
codealmanac setup --yes --sync-off

# Do not install automatic wiki cleanup
codealmanac setup --yes --garden-off

# Do not install automatic CodeAlmanac updates
codealmanac setup --yes --no-auto-update

To uninstall CodeAlmanac-owned local artifacts:

codealmanac uninstall --yes

Daily Read Surface

Agents and humans use the same local read commands:

codealmanac search "checkout timeout"
codealmanac search --mentions src/checkout/
codealmanac show checkout-flow
codealmanac topics
codealmanac health
codealmanac validate

Use --wiki <name> to read another registered local wiki. By default, commands target the exact current directory when it is a registered repository root.

Updating The Wiki

Lifecycle commands run one of three explicit agents—build, ingest, or garden— through the public Yoke SDK. The existing packaged prompt files remain the complete task instructions and direct agents to edit the wiki under almanac/.

Lifecycle agents are trusted local coding agents. They run with the same broad, non-interactive filesystem permissions CodeAlmanac historically provided, so the almanac/ boundary is an instruction and commit policy, not an OS sandbox. Run lifecycle commands only in repositories where you accept that trust model, and review the resulting Git diff when automatic commits are disabled.

codealmanac ingest README.md --using codex
codealmanac ingest github:pr:123 --using claude
codealmanac garden --using codex

ingest folds selected local material into the wiki. Inputs can include files, directories, Git diffs, commit ranges, GitHub PRs or issues, URLs, and local agent transcripts.

garden improves the existing wiki graph: stale pages, links, topics, weak leads, duplicate pages, and unsupported claims.

No-op is valid. If the material adds no durable wiki knowledge, the harness should leave the wiki unchanged.

init, ingest, and garden create queued runs and start a local worker. To follow them visually, run codealmanac serve and select Jobs in the sidebar. To stay in the terminal, use codealmanac jobs attach <run-id>.

Sync And Automation

CodeAlmanac can keep registered wikis current without requiring you to remember maintenance commands.

Sync scans local Codex and Claude transcript stores for conversations active since the previous completed sync. Conversations associated with registered repositories are queued as ordinary ingest jobs. Sync may decide that a conversation contains no durable knowledge and leave the wiki unchanged.

Garden periodically queues a maintenance job for each registered wiki. It improves stale pages, weak links, topics, duplicated knowledge, and graph structure.

Update keeps the locally installed CodeAlmanac CLI current. Scheduled updates are skipped when an update would be unsafe, such as while lifecycle work is active.

Automation is implemented with local macOS launchd jobs, not a hosted service or cloud sync. Logs are stored under ~/.codealmanac/logs/.

# See installed schedules
codealmanac automation status

# Change a schedule
codealmanac config set automation.sync.every 5h
codealmanac config set automation.garden.every 24h
codealmanac config set automation.update.every 24h

# Disable or re-enable a schedule
codealmanac config set automation.sync.enabled false
codealmanac config set automation.sync.enabled true

config set updates the user TOML and immediately makes launchd match. If you edit the TOML directly, run codealmanac config apply afterward.

Automation creates individual background runs. Inspect those runs separately with codealmanac jobs.

Jobs

Lifecycle runs are recorded under ~/.codealmanac/. Use these commands to inspect and control them:

# List recent jobs with their IDs, kinds, statuses, and elapsed times
codealmanac jobs

# Show one job's status, summary, page changes, timestamps, and error details
codealmanac jobs show <run-id>

# Print the events recorded so far, including progress, tool activity, and errors
codealmanac jobs logs <run-id>

# Follow new events live until the job finishes, fails, or is marked cancelled
codealmanac jobs attach <run-id>

# Prevent a queued job from starting, or stop a running job and its agent
codealmanac jobs cancel <run-id>

show is a summary of the job; logs is a snapshot of its event history; attach keeps watching and prints events as they arrive. All of these commands read the same durable local job record, so they still work after the terminal that started the job has closed. Add --json when consuming their output from a script.

Providers

CodeAlmanac uses almanac-yoke as its single provider boundary. Codex runs through app-server; Claude uses Yoke's default Claude surface (currently the Python Agent SDK). Existing Codex or Claude Code OAuth sessions are reused, and API credentials can be supplied through Yoke when embedding the SDK.

Build, ingest, and garden are packaged as a Yoke agent collection under src/codealmanac/agents/. Each agent uses Yoke's native folder contract: agent.yaml describes tools and permissions, while instructions.md contains the durable agent instructions. A lifecycle run passes only its typed runtime context as the task prompt. Optional Yoke skills/, subagents/, and workflows/ folders can be added to an agent when the product needs them; native Claude or Codex execution still decides how and when to use them.

codex login
claude auth login
codealmanac doctor

Read commands do not need provider credentials. Write-capable lifecycle commands need the selected harness to be available and authenticated.

What Gets Created By Init

With the default root:

your-repo/
|-- almanac/
|   |-- README.md
|   |-- topics.yaml
|   |-- architecture/
|   |   |-- README.md
|   |   `-- indexer.md
|   |-- decisions/
|   |   `-- local-first.md
|   `-- guides/
|       `-- setup.md
|-- src/
`-- ...

Markdown pages live directly under almanac/ in meaningful folders. topics.yaml organizes pages across folders. README.md files act as landing pages for their folder routes.

For auto-detection, a repository counts as a CodeAlmanac wiki when almanac/topics.yaml and almanac/README.md exist.

Runtime State

Derived local state lives under ~/.codealmanac/:

~/.codealmanac/codealmanac.db
~/.codealmanac/repos/<repo-id>/index.db

The local database records repositories, runs, run events, worker locks, and sync state. Per-repository runtime files contain derived indexes. They do not belong in the committed almanac/ tree.

Configuration

User config lives at:

~/.codealmanac/config.toml

The supported defaults are:

auto_commit = true

[harness]
default = "codex"
model = "gpt-5.5"

[automation.sync]
enabled = true
every = "5h"

[automation.garden]
enabled = true
every = "24h"

[automation.update]
enabled = true
every = "24h"

CLI flags still win over config.

Use codealmanac config set <key> <value> for normal changes. It applies automation changes to launchd immediately. Direct file edits are supported but must be followed by:

codealmanac config apply

auto_commit means lifecycle prompts may tell the selected agent to use normal Git commands for wiki source changes. CodeAlmanac does not stage files, split diffs, or commit internally.

codealmanac setup --no-auto-commit
codealmanac config set auto_commit false
codealmanac config set auto_commit true

Local Viewer

codealmanac serve

The viewer is read-only. It renders pages, search, topics, backlinks, and file-reference navigation from local wiki data. serve opens it in your default browser once the server is ready; use codealmanac serve --no-open for headless or scripted use. By default the viewer can switch across available registered local wikis. Use codealmanac serve --wiki <name> to narrow it to one wiki.

Migrating From The npm CLI

The legacy codealmanac npm package is retired. PyPI is the only supported distribution. If you used the npm CLI, your machine may still carry the old global install plus the hooks and agent instructions it set up. Remove those before installing from PyPI.

Remove the old global package and any CodeAlmanac hooks or agent-instruction sections it installed, then install and set up the Python CLI:

npm uninstall -g codealmanac
uv tool install codealmanac@latest
codealmanac setup --yes
codealmanac doctor

Also remove old bun, pnpm, or yarn installs and any stray legacy binaries from PATH. Leave repo-local almanac/ trees alone; they are committed wiki content, not part of the CLI install.

Troubleshooting

harness codex failed with status failed: Error: spawn ... codex ENOENT

The Codex CLI on this machine is broken or missing: the @openai/codex package is installed but its native binary is gone (a common result of an interrupted install or a Node version switch under nvm/volta/fnm). Verify with:

codex --version

If that fails with the same spawn ... ENOENT, reinstall the Codex CLI:

npm install -g @openai/codex
codex --version       # confirm the binary runs
codex login status    # confirm you are still signed in

Reinstalling does not sign you out: codex keeps its login under ~/.codex, outside the npm package.

Or switch CodeAlmanac to the Claude harness instead:

codealmanac config set harness.default claude

The same applies to harness claude failed errors: check claude --version, reinstall the Claude Code CLI if broken, or switch the default harness. codealmanac doctor reports harness availability.

Current Contract

This rewrite is local-only for now.

  • Public command: codealmanac
  • Short alias: ca
  • Repo wiki root: almanac/ only
  • Alternate repo wiki roots: none
  • User state root: ~/.codealmanac/
  • Runtime: Python 3.12+
  • Storage: local markdown plus derived state under ~/.codealmanac/
  • No hosted login/connect/upload commands.
  • No public SDK or MCP package.
  • No legacy compatibility aliases beyond the supported ca shorthand.
  • No alternate wiki roots.
  • Optional anonymous usage and sanitized crash telemetry; disable it with codealmanac config set telemetry.enabled false or --no-telemetry in setup.
  • No wiki, source, prompt, transcript, path, or command-argument upload path.
  • No second canonical product name.

This is the Python/PyPI product surface. Hosted integration can be added later around the same repo-owned wiki artifact, but it is not part of this release surface.

Choose No in setup, pass setup --no-telemetry, set telemetry.enabled to false, or use DO_NOT_TRACK=1 at any time. Without a future login, the UUID profile has no name or email.

sentences.en: The final setup step asks about anonymous telemetry and recommends Yes so we can see which commands work and where the CLI breaks.
sentences.zh: 最后的设置步骤询问匿名遥测并建议选择“是”，这样我们就可以看到哪些命令有效以及 CLI 在哪里中断。

sentences.en: It sends controlled command and lifecycle outcomes plus sanitized unhandled crashes under a random install UUID.
sentences.zh: 它会在随机安装 UUID 下发送受控命令和生命周期结果以及已清理的未处理崩溃。

sentences.en: It never sends code, paths, arguments, queries, prompts, transcripts, repository/run IDs, locals, or credentials; GeoIP is disabled.
sentences.zh: 它从不发送代码、路径、参数、查询、提示、记录、存储库/运行 ID、本地变量或凭据； GeoIP 已禁用。

sentences.en: Choose No in setup, pass setup --no-telemetry, set telemetry.enabled to false, or use DO_NOT_TRACK=1 at any time.
sentences.zh: 在 setup 中选择 No，传递 setup --no-telemetry，将 telemetry.enabled 设置为 false，或随时使用 DO_NOT_TRACK=1。

sentences.en: Without a future login, the UUID profile has no name or email.
sentences.zh: 如果以后没有登录，UUID 配置文件就没有姓名或电子邮件。

blocks.html_en: Agents and humans use the same local read commands:

blocks.html_en: Use --wiki <name> to read another registered local wiki. By default, commands target the exact current directory when it is a registered repository root.

sentences.en: Use --wiki <name> to read another registered local wiki.
sentences.zh: 使用 --wiki <name> 读取另一个已注册的本地 wiki。

blocks.html_en: Updating The Wiki

sentences.en: Updating The Wiki
sentences.zh: 更新维基

blocks.html_en: Lifecycle commands run one of three explicit agents—build, ingest, or garden— through the public Yoke SDK. The existing packaged prompt files remain the complete task instructions and direct agents to edit the wiki under almanac/.

sentences.en: Lifecycle commands run one of three explicit agents—build, ingest, or garden— through the public Yoke SDK.
sentences.zh: 生命周期命令通过公共 Yoke SDK 运行三个显式代理之一：构建、摄取或花园。

sentences.en: The existing packaged prompt files remain the complete task instructions and direct agents to edit the wiki under almanac/.
sentences.zh: 现有的打包提示文件仍然是完整的任务说明，并指导代理编辑 almanac/ 下的 wiki。

blocks.html_en: Lifecycle agents are trusted local coding agents. They run with the same broad, non-interactive filesystem permissions CodeAlmanac historically provided, so the almanac/ boundary is an instruction and commit policy, not an OS sandbox. Run lifecycle commands only in repositories where you accept that trust model, and review the resulting Git diff when automatic commits are disabled.

sentences.en: Lifecycle agents are trusted local coding agents.
sentences.zh: 生命周期代理是值得信赖的本地编码代理。

sentences.en: They run with the same broad, non-interactive filesystem permissions CodeAlmanac historically provided, so the almanac/ boundary is an instruction and commit policy, not an OS sandbox.
sentences.zh: 它们使用 CodeAlmanac 历史上提供的相同广泛的非交互式文件系统权限运行，因此 almanac/ 边界是指令和提交策略，而不是操作系统沙箱。

sentences.en: Run lifecycle commands only in repositories where you accept that trust model, and review the resulting Git diff when automatic commits are disabled.
sentences.zh: 仅在接受该信任模型的存储库中运行生命周期命令，并在禁用自动提交时查看生成的 Git diff。

blocks.html_en: ingest folds selected local material into the wiki. Inputs can include files, directories, Git diffs, commit ranges, GitHub PRs or issues, URLs, and local agent transcripts.

sentences.en: ingest folds selected local material into the wiki.
sentences.zh: 摄取将选定的本地材料折叠到 wiki 中。

sentences.en: Inputs can include files, directories, Git diffs, commit ranges, GitHub PRs or issues, URLs, and local agent transcripts.
sentences.zh: 输入可以包括文件、目录、Git diff、提交范围、GitHub PR 或问题、URL 和本地代理记录。

blocks.html_en: garden improves the existing wiki graph: stale pages, links, topics, weak leads, duplicate pages, and unsupported claims.

sentences.en: garden improves the existing wiki graph: stale pages, links, topics, weak leads, duplicate pages, and unsupported claims.
sentences.zh: Garden 改进了现有的 wiki 图表：过时的页面、链接、主题、薄弱线索、重复页面和不受支持的声明。

blocks.html_en: No-op is valid. If the material adds no durable wiki knowledge, the harness should leave the wiki unchanged.

sentences.en: No-op is valid.
sentences.zh: 无操作有效。

sentences.en: If the material adds no durable wiki knowledge, the harness should leave the wiki unchanged.
sentences.zh: 如果该材料没有添加持久的 wiki 知识，那么该工具应该使 wiki 保持不变。

blocks.html_en: init, ingest, and garden create queued runs and start a local worker. To follow them visually, run codealmanac serve and select Jobs in the sidebar. To stay in the terminal, use codealmanac jobs attach <run-id>.

sentences.en: init, ingest, and garden create queued runs and start a local worker.
sentences.zh: init、ingest 和 Garden 创建排队运行并启动本地工作线程。

sentences.en: To follow them visually, run codealmanac serve and select Jobs in the sidebar.
sentences.zh: 要直观地跟踪它们，请运行 codealmanacserve 并选择侧栏中的“作业”。

sentences.en: To stay in the terminal, use codealmanac jobs attach <run-id>.
sentences.zh: 要留在终端中，请使用 codealmanac jobs Attach <run-id>。

blocks.html_en: Sync And Automation

sentences.en: Sync And Automation
sentences.zh: 同步和自动化

blocks.html_en: CodeAlmanac can keep registered wikis current without requiring you to remember maintenance commands.

sentences.en: CodeAlmanac can keep registered wikis current without requiring you to remember maintenance commands.
sentences.zh: CodeAlmanac 可以使已注册的 wiki 保持最新状态，而无需您记住维护命令。

blocks.html_en: Sync scans local Codex and Claude transcript stores for conversations active since the previous completed sync. Conversations associated with registered repositories are queued as ordinary ingest jobs. Sync may decide that a conversation contains no durable knowledge and leave the wiki unchanged.

sentences.en: Sync scans local Codex and Claude transcript stores for conversations active since the previous completed sync.
sentences.zh: 同步会扫描本地 Codex 和 Claude 转录存储，以查找自上次完成同步以来的活动对话。

sentences.en: Conversations associated with registered repositories are queued as ordinary ingest jobs.
sentences.zh: 与注册存储库关联的对话将作为普通摄取作业排队。

sentences.en: Sync may decide that a conversation contains no durable knowledge and leave the wiki unchanged.
sentences.zh: 同步可能会判定对话不包含持久知识并保持 wiki 不变。

blocks.html_en: Garden periodically queues a maintenance job for each registered wiki. It improves stale pages, weak links, topics, duplicated knowledge, and graph structure.

sentences.en: Garden periodically queues a maintenance job for each registered wiki.
sentences.zh: Garden 定期为每个注册的 wiki 排队维护作业。

sentences.en: It improves stale pages, weak links, topics, duplicated knowledge, and graph structure.
sentences.zh: 它改善了陈旧的页面、薄弱的链接、主题、重复的知识和图形结构。

blocks.html_en: Update keeps the locally installed CodeAlmanac CLI current. Scheduled updates are skipped when an update would be unsafe, such as while lifecycle work is active.

sentences.en: Update keeps the locally installed CodeAlmanac CLI current.
sentences.zh: 更新使本地安装的 CodeAlmanac CLI 保持最新。

sentences.en: Scheduled updates are skipped when an update would be unsafe, such as while lifecycle work is active.
sentences.zh: 当更新不安全时（例如生命周期工作处于活动状态），会跳过计划的更新。

blocks.html_en: Automation is implemented with local macOS launchd jobs, not a hosted service or cloud sync. Logs are stored under ~/.codealmanac/logs/.

sentences.en: Automation is implemented with local macOS launchd jobs, not a hosted service or cloud sync.
sentences.zh: 自动化是通过本地 macOS 启动的作业来实现的，而不是托管服务或云同步。

sentences.en: Logs are stored under ~/.codealmanac/logs/.
sentences.zh: 日志存储在 ~/.codealmanac/logs/ 下。

blocks.html_en: config set updates the user TOML and immediately makes launchd match. If you edit the TOML directly, run codealmanac config apply afterward.

sentences.en: config set updates the user TOML and immediately makes launchd match.
sentences.zh: 配置集更新用户 TOML 并立即使 launchd 匹配。

sentences.en: If you edit the TOML directly, run codealmanac config apply afterward.
sentences.zh: 如果直接编辑 TOML，请随后运行 codealmanac config apply。

blocks.html_en: Automation creates individual background runs. Inspect those runs separately with codealmanac jobs.

sentences.en: Automation creates individual background runs.
sentences.zh: 自动化创建单独的后台运行。

sentences.en: Inspect those runs separately with codealmanac jobs.
sentences.zh: 使用 codealmanac 作业单独检查这些运行。

blocks.html_en: Jobs
Lifecycle runs are recorded under ~/.codealmanac/. Use these commands to inspect and control them:

sentences.en: Lifecycle runs are recorded under ~/.codealmanac/.
sentences.zh: 生命周期运行记录在 ~/.codealmanac/ 下。

sentences.en: Use these commands to inspect and control them:
sentences.zh: 使用这些命令来检查和控制它们：

blocks.html_en: show is a summary of the job; logs is a snapshot of its event history; attach keeps watching and prints events as they arrive. All of these commands read the same durable local job record, so they still work after the terminal that started the job has closed. Add --json when consuming their output from a script.

sentences.en: show is a summary of the job; logs is a snapshot of its event history; attach keeps watching and prints events as they arrive.
sentences.zh: 展示是工作的总结；日志是其事件历史记录的快照； Attach 会持续监视并在事件到达时打印事件。

sentences.en: All of these commands read the same durable local job record, so they still work after the terminal that started the job has closed.
sentences.zh: 所有这些命令都会读取相同的持久本地作业记录，因此在启动作业的终端关闭后它们仍然可以工作。

sentences.en: Add --json when consuming their output from a script.
sentences.zh: 在使用脚本的输出时添加 --json。

blocks.html_en: Providers

sentences.en: Providers
sentences.zh: 供应商

blocks.html_en: CodeAlmanac uses almanac-yoke as its single provider boundary. Codex runs through app-server; Claude uses Yoke's default Claude surface (currently the Python Agent SDK). Existing Codex or Claude Code OAuth sessions are reused, and API credentials can be supplied through Yoke when embedding the SDK.

sentences.en: CodeAlmanac uses almanac-yoke as its single provider boundary.
sentences.zh: CodeAlmanac 使用 almanac-yoke 作为其单一提供者边界。

sentences.en: Codex runs through app-server; Claude uses Yoke's default Claude surface (currently the Python Agent SDK).
sentences.zh: Codex通过应用程序服务器运行； Claude 使用 Yoke 的默认 Claude 表面（当前为 Python Agent SDK）。

sentences.en: Existing Codex or Claude Code OAuth sessions are reused, and API credentials can be supplied through Yoke when embedding the SDK.
sentences.zh: 现有的 Codex 或 Claude Code OAuth 会话将被重用，并且在嵌入 SDK 时可以通过 Yoke 提供 API 凭据。

blocks.html_en: Build, ingest, and garden are packaged as a Yoke agent collection under src/codealmanac/agents/. Each agent uses Yoke's native folder contract: agent.yaml describes tools and permissions, while instructions.md contains the durable agent instructions. A lifecycle run passes only its typed runtime context as the task prompt. Optional Yoke skills/, subagents/, and workflows/ folders can be added to an agent when the product needs them; native Claude or Codex execution still decides how and when to use them.

sentences.en: Build, ingest, and garden are packaged as a Yoke agent collection under src/codealmanac/agents/.
sentences.zh: 构建、摄取和花园打包为 src/codealmanac/agents/ 下的 Yoke 代理集合。

sentences.en: Each agent uses Yoke's native folder contract: agent.yaml describes tools and permissions, while instructions.md contains the durable agent instructions.
sentences.zh: 每个代理都使用 Yoke 的本机文件夹合约：agent.yaml 描述工具和权限，而 instructions.md 包含持久代理指令。

sentences.en: A lifecycle run passes only its typed runtime context as the task prompt.
sentences.zh: 生命周期运行仅传递其类型化的运行时上下文作为任务提示。

sentences.en: Optional Yoke skills/, subagents/, and workflows/ folders can be added to an agent when the product needs them; native Claude or Codex execution still decides how and when to use them.
sentences.zh: 当产品需要时，可选的Yoke技能/、子代理/和工作流程/文件夹可以添加到代理中；本地 Claude 或 Codex 执行仍然决定如何以及何时使用它们。

blocks.html_en: Read commands do not need provider credentials. Write-capable lifecycle commands need the selected harness to be available and authenticated.

sentences.en: Read commands do not need provider credentials.
sentences.zh: 读取命令不需要提供者凭据。

sentences.en: Write-capable lifecycle commands need the selected harness to be available and authenticated.
sentences.zh: 可写入的生命周期命令需要所选线束可用并经过身份验证。

blocks.html_en: Local Viewer

sentences.en: Local Viewer
sentences.zh: 本地查看器

blocks.html_en: The viewer is read-only. It renders pages, search, topics, backlinks, and file-reference navigation from local wiki data. serve opens it in your default browser once the server is ready; use codealmanac serve --no-open for headless or scripted use. By default the viewer can switch across available registered local wikis. Use codealmanac serve --wiki <name> to narrow it to one wiki.

sentences.en: The viewer is read-only.
sentences.zh: 查看器是只读的。

sentences.en: It renders pages, search, topics, backlinks, and file-reference navigation from local wiki data.
sentences.zh: 它从本地 wiki 数据呈现页面、搜索、主题、反向链接和文件引用导航。

sentences.en: serve opens it in your default browser once the server is ready; use codealmanac serve --no-open for headless or scripted use.
sentences.zh: 服务器准备就绪后，serve 将在您的默认浏览器中打开它；使用 codealmanacserve --no-open 进行无头或脚本使用。

sentences.zh: 默认情况下，查看者可以在可用的已注册本地 wiki 之间切换。

sentences.en: Use codealmanac serve --wiki <name> to narrow it to one wiki.
sentences.zh: 使用 codealmanacserve --wiki <name> 将其范围缩小到一个 wiki。

blocks.html_en: Migrating From The npm CLI

sentences.en: Migrating From The npm CLI
sentences.zh: 从 npm CLI 迁移

blocks.html_en: The legacy codealmanac npm package is retired. PyPI is the only supported distribution. If you used the npm CLI, your machine may still carry the old global install plus the hooks and agent instructions it set up. Remove those before installing from PyPI.

sentences.en: The legacy codealmanac npm package is retired.
sentences.zh: 旧版 codealmanac npm 包已停用。

sentences.en: PyPI is the only supported distribution.
sentences.zh: PyPI 是唯一受支持的发行版。

sentences.en: If you used the npm CLI, your machine may still carry the old global install plus the hooks and agent instructions it set up.
sentences.zh: 如果您使用 npm CLI，您的计算机可能仍然带有旧的全局安装以及它设置的挂钩和代理指令。

sentences.en: Remove those before installing from PyPI.
sentences.zh: 从 PyPI 安装之前删除它们。

blocks.html_en: Remove the old global package and any CodeAlmanac hooks or agent-instruction sections it installed, then install and set up the Python CLI:

sentences.en: Remove the old global package and any CodeAlmanac hooks or agent-instruction sections it installed, then install and set up the Python CLI:
sentences.zh: 删除旧的全局包及其安装的任何 CodeAlmanac 挂钩或代理指令部分，然后安装并设置 Python CLI：

blocks.html_en: Also remove old bun, pnpm, or yarn installs and any stray legacy binaries from PATH. Leave repo-local almanac/ trees alone; they are committed wiki content, not part of the CLI install.

sentences.en: Also remove old bun, pnpm, or yarn installs and any stray legacy binaries from PATH.
sentences.zh: 还要从 PATH 中删除旧的 Bun、pnpm 或 Yarn 安装以及任何杂散的遗留二进制文件。

sentences.en: Leave repo-local almanac/ trees alone; they are committed wiki content, not part of the CLI install.
sentences.zh: 不去管回购本地年历/树；它们是提交的 wiki 内容，而不是 CLI 安装的一部分。

content_html_zh:
代码库的动态 wiki，由 AI 编码代理维护。

CodeAlmanac 为 AI 代理提供了仅靠代码无法容纳的上下文：为什么系统是这样形成的、之前发生了什么故障、哪些不变量很重要，以及工作流程如何跨文件和服务。 wiki 是您的存储库中的简单 Markdown，在本地建立索引，并像任何其他代码更改一样在 Git 中进行审核。

今日支持：带有 Codex 或 Claude Code 的 macOS。 需要 Python 3.12+。

快速入门

uv tool install codealmanac@latest
codealmanac setup

有关配置选项，请参阅设置。

设置 CodeAlmanac 后：

cd your-repo
codealmanac init                     # Makes your wiki, if you don't have one
codealmanac search "getting started" # Shows matching wiki pages.
codealmanac show getting-started     # Opens one page in the terminal
codealmanac serve                    # Shows the wiki in local web viewer.

Setup

为您使用的本地工具安装全局代理说明：

# Interactive setup
codealmanac setup

# Quick install with recommended defaults; uses Codex as the AI runner
codealmanac setup --yes

# Quick install using Claude as the AI runner
codealmanac setup --yes --runner claude

安装程序会为您选择的工具和三个本地 macOS 启动作业安装代理指令。 作业和所有 wiki 工作都在本地运行。

Job 默认时间表 它的作用
Sync 每5小时一次 扫描最近的 Codex 和 Claude 对话，并为相关注册 wiki 排列有用的知识。
花园 每24小时一次 审查每个注册的 wiki 是否有陈旧、重复或关联性较差的知识。
更新 每24小时一次 在安全的情况下检查并安装 CodeAlmanac CLI 更新。

这些计划在本地后台运行。 使用 codealmanac 自动化状态查看安装的内容。

最后的设置步骤询问匿名遥测并建议选择“是”，这样我们就可以看到哪些命令有效以及 CLI 在哪里中断。 它会在随机安装 UUID 下发送受控命令和生命周期结果以及已清理的未处理崩溃。 它从不发送代码、路径、参数、查询、提示、记录、存储库/运行 ID、本地变量或凭据； GeoIP 已禁用。 在 setup 中选择 No，传递 setup --no-telemetry，将 telemetry.enabled 设置为 false，或随时使用 DO_NOT_TRACK=1。 如果以后没有登录，UUID 配置文件就没有姓名或电子邮件。

如果您没有 Codex 或者更喜欢 Claude，请使用 --runner claude。

--target 只选择安装哪些全局代理指令文件；它不选择 AI 跑步者：

codealmanac setup --yes --target codex
codealmanac setup --yes --target claude

在设置过程中自定义自动工作：

# Change how often recent agent conversations are scanned
codealmanac setup --yes --sync-every 5h

# Do not install automatic transcript sync
codealmanac setup --yes --sync-off

# Do not install automatic wiki cleanup
codealmanac setup --yes --garden-off

# Do not install automatic CodeAlmanac updates
codealmanac setup --yes --no-auto-update

要卸载 CodeAlmanac 拥有的本地工件：

codealmanac uninstall --yes

每日阅读表面

代理和人类使用相同的本地读取命令：

codealmanac search "checkout timeout"
codealmanac search --mentions src/checkout/
codealmanac show checkout-flow
codealmanac topics
codealmanac health
codealmanac validate

使用 --wiki <name> 读取另一个已注册的本地 wiki。 默认情况下，当当前目录是已注册的存储库根目录时，命令会针对确切的当前目录。

更新维基

生命周期命令通过公共 Yoke SDK 运行三个显式代理之一：构建、摄取或花园。 现有的打包提示文件仍然是完整的任务说明，并指导代理编辑 almanac/ 下的 wiki。

生命周期代理是值得信赖的本地编码代理。 它们使用 CodeAlmanac 历史上提供的相同广泛的非交互式文件系统权限运行，因此 almanac/ 边界是指令和提交策略，而不是操作系统沙箱。 仅在接受该信任模型的存储库中运行生命周期命令，并在禁用自动提交时查看生成的 Git diff。

codealmanac ingest README.md --using codex
codealmanac ingest github:pr:123 --using claude
codealmanac garden --using codex

摄取将选定的本地材料折叠到 wiki 中。 输入可以包括文件、目录、Git diff、提交范围、GitHub PR 或问题、URL 和本地代理记录。

Garden 改进了现有的 wiki 图表：过时的页面、链接、主题、薄弱线索、重复页面和不受支持的声明。

无操作有效。 如果该材料没有添加持久的 wiki 知识，那么该工具应该使 wiki 保持不变。

init、ingest 和 Garden 创建排队运行并启动本地工作线程。 要直观地跟踪它们，请运行 codealmanacserve 并选择侧栏中的“作业”。 要留在终端中，请使用 codealmanac jobs Attach <run-id>。

同步和自动化

CodeAlmanac 可以使已注册的 wiki 保持最新状态，而无需您记住维护命令。

同步会扫描本地 Codex 和 Claude 转录存储，以查找自上次完成同步以来的活动对话。 与注册存储库关联的对话将作为普通摄取作业排队。 同步可能会判定对话不包含持久知识并保持 wiki 不变。

Garden 定期为每个注册的 wiki 排队维护作业。 它改善了陈旧的页面、薄弱的链接、主题、重复的知识和图形结构。

更新使本地安装的 CodeAlmanac CLI 保持最新。 当更新不安全时（例如生命周期工作处于活动状态），会跳过计划的更新。

自动化是通过本地 macOS 启动的作业来实现的，而不是托管服务或云同步。 日志存储在 ~/.codealmanac/logs/ 下。

# See installed schedules
codealmanac automation status

# Change a schedule
codealmanac config set automation.sync.every 5h
codealmanac config set automation.garden.every 24h
codealmanac config set automation.update.every 24h

# Disable or re-enable a schedule
codealmanac config set automation.sync.enabled false
codealmanac config set automation.sync.enabled true

配置集更新用户 TOML 并立即使 launchd 匹配。 如果直接编辑 TOML，请随后运行 codealmanac config apply。

自动化创建单独的后台运行。 使用 codealmanac 作业单独检查这些运行。

Jobs

生命周期运行记录在 ~/.codealmanac/ 下。 使用这些命令来检查和控制它们：

# List recent jobs with their IDs, kinds, statuses, and elapsed times
codealmanac jobs

# Show one job's status, summary, page changes, timestamps, and error details
codealmanac jobs show <run-id>

# Print the events recorded so far, including progress, tool activity, and errors
codealmanac jobs logs <run-id>

# Follow new events live until the job finishes, fails, or is marked cancelled
codealmanac jobs attach <run-id>

# Prevent a queued job from starting, or stop a running job and its agent
codealmanac jobs cancel <run-id>

展示是工作的总结；日志是其事件历史记录的快照； Attach 会持续监视并在事件到达时打印事件。 所有这些命令都会读取相同的持久本地作业记录，因此在启动作业的终端关闭后它们仍然可以工作。 在使用脚本的输出时添加 --json。

供应商

CodeAlmanac 使用 almanac-yoke 作为其单一提供者边界。 Codex通过应用程序服务器运行； Claude 使用 Yoke 的默认 Claude 表面（当前为 Python Agent SDK）。 现有的 Codex 或 Claude Code OAuth 会话将被重用，并且在嵌入 SDK 时可以通过 Yoke 提供 API 凭据。

构建、摄取和花园打包为 src/codealmanac/agents/ 下的 Yoke 代理集合。 每个代理都使用 Yoke 的本机文件夹合约：agent.yaml 描述工具和权限，而 instructions.md 包含持久代理指令。 生命周期运行仅传递其类型化的运行时上下文作为任务提示。 当产品需要时，可选的Yoke技能/、子代理/和工作流程/文件夹可以添加到代理中；本地 Claude 或 Codex 执行仍然决定如何以及何时使用它们。

codex login
claude auth login
codealmanac doctor

读取命令不需要提供者凭据。 可写入的生命周期命令需要所选线束可用并经过身份验证。

Init 创建了什么

使用默认根：

your-repo/
|-- almanac/
|   |-- README.md
|   |-- topics.yaml
|   |-- architecture/
|   |   |-- README.md
|   |   `-- indexer.md
|   |-- decisions/
|   |   `-- local-first.md
|   `-- guides/
|       `-- setup.md
|-- src/
`-- ...

Markdown 页面直接位于 almanac/ 下有意义的文件夹中。 topic.yaml 跨文件夹组织页面。 README.md 文件充当其文件夹路由的登陆页面。

对于自动检测，当 almanac/topics.yaml 和 almanac/README.md 存在时，存储库将被视为 CodeAlmanac wiki。

运行时状态

派生的本地状态位于 ~/.codealmanac/ 下：

~/.codealmanac/codealmanac.db
~/.codealmanac/repos/<repo-id>/index.db

本地数据库记录存储库、运行、运行事件、工作锁和同步状态。 每个存储库运行时文件包含派生索引。 它们不属于提交的年历/树。

配置

用户配置位于：

~/.codealmanac/config.toml

支持的默认值是：

auto_commit = true

[harness]
default = "codex"
model = "gpt-5.5"

[automation.sync]
enabled = true
every = "5h"

[automation.garden]
enabled = true
every = "24h"

[automation.update]
enabled = true
every = "24h"

CLI 标志仍然胜过配置。

使用 codealmanac config set <key> <value> 进行正常更改。 它立即将自动化更改应用于 launchd。 支持直接文件编辑，但必须遵循：

codealmanac config apply

auto_commit 意味着生命周期提示可能会告诉所选代理使用普通的 Git 命令进行 wiki 源更改。 CodeAlmanac 不会暂存文件、拆分差异或内部提交。

codealmanac setup --no-auto-commit
codealmanac config set auto_commit false
codealmanac config set auto_commit true

本地查看器

codealmanac serve

查看器是只读的。 它从本地 wiki 数据呈现页面、搜索、主题、反向链接和文件引用导航。 服务器准备就绪后，serve 将在您的默认浏览器中打开它；使用 codealmanacserve --no-open 进行无头或脚本使用。 默认情况下，查看者可以在可用的已注册本地 wiki 之间切换。 使用 codealmanacserve --wiki <name> 将其范围缩小到一个 wiki。

从 npm CLI 迁移

旧版 codealmanac npm 包已停用。 PyPI 是唯一受支持的发行版。 如果您使用 npm CLI，您的计算机可能仍然带有旧的全局安装以及它设置的挂钩和代理指令。 从 PyPI 安装之前删除它们。

删除旧的全局包及其安装的任何 CodeAlmanac 挂钩或代理指令部分，然后安装并设置 Python CLI：

npm uninstall -g codealmanac
uv tool install codealmanac@latest
codealmanac setup --yes
codealmanac doctor

还要从 PATH 中删除旧的 Bun、pnpm 或 Yarn 安装以及任何杂散的遗留二进制文件。 不去管回购本地年历/树；它们是提交的 wiki 内容，而不是 CLI 安装的一部分。

故障排除

线束法典失败，状态失败：错误：生成... 法典ENOENT

此计算机上的 Codex CLI 已损坏或丢失：@openai/codex 软件包已安装，但其本机二进制文件消失了（安装中断或 nvm/volta/fnm 下的 Node 版本切换的常见结果）。 验证：

codex --version

如果在相同的生成下失败...... ENOENT，重新安装 Codex CLI：

npm install -g @openai/codex
codex --version       # confirm the binary runs
codex login status    # confirm you are still signed in

重新安装不会让您注销：codex 将其登录信息保留在 npm 包之外的 ~/.codex 下。

或者将 CodeAlmanac 切换到 Claude 线束：

codealmanac config set harness.default claude

这同样适用于harness claude失败错误：检查claude --version，如果损坏则重新安装Claude Code CLI，或者切换默认harness。 Codealmanac 医生报告安全带可用性。

当前合同

此重写目前仅限于本地。

  • 公共命令：codealmanac
  • 短别名：ca
  • 回购维基根：almanac/仅
  • 备用 repo wiki 根：无
  • 用户状态根：~/.codealmanac/
  • 运行时：Python 3.12+
  • 存储：本地 Markdown 加上 ~/.codealmanac/ 下的派生状态
  • 没有托管登录/连接/上传命令。
  • 没有公共 SDK 或 MCP 包。
  • 除了支持的 ca 速记之外，没有旧版兼容性别名。
  • 没有替代的维基根。
  • 可选的匿名使用和经过净化的崩溃遥测；在设置中使用 codealmanac config set telemetry.enabled false 或 --no-telemetry 禁用它。
  • 没有 wiki、来源、提示、脚本、路径或命令参数上传路径。
  • 没有第二个规范的产品名称。

这是 Python/PyPI 产品界面。 稍后可以围绕同一存储库拥有的 wiki 工件添加托管集成，但它不是此发行版面的一部分。
